transcriptUz: Qisqa qilib aytganda, buni ta'riflashga til ojiz. The beauty of the Czech Republic. Chexiyaning go'zalligi. Agar oramizda Chexiyada o'qiyotganlar yo birorta o'qiyotganlarni tanishi bo'lsa, aytib qo'yinglar, ertaga ham Chexiyada bo'lamiz.
summaryEn: The speaker shares a panoramic view of a city, likely Prague, and states that its beauty is indescribable. He then mentions that he will be in the Czech Republic tomorrow and invites anyone studying there or knowing someone studying there to reach out.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, xormanglar bolajonlar, charchamayapsizlarmi? Sog'liqlar, ahvollar yaxshimi? Xo'p, ko'rib turganinglardek, hozir Pragadagi bir kishilik ko'chadan o'tdik. Raju bu ko'chada svetofor ham bor edi. Svetofor ham bor edi, hozir ko'rinmadi, orqa tarafda, bu yoqda bor ekan mana. O'sha svetofor, mashhur bir kishilik ko'cha. Juda go'zal, ajoyib view. Va hozir tepadagi tashlagan messageim bo'yicha to'xtalmoqchiman. Xo'p, demak, tepada tashlagan messageimni organizatori Ruxshona. Ana shu S-M-N-ga kirganimizda tanishgan juda ham ajoyib tanishlarimdan biri. Juda ham ajoyib organizator va organizatorlardan biri, keyin bunda bu yil Ruxshona. O'shani hisobiga bu narsani sizlarga highly suggest qilaman. Bunda qatnashishlar. Sizlar aytishinglar mumkin, MUN nima, bu hech qanaqa foydasi yo'q, hech narsa bermaydi-yu deyishilar mumkin, lekin yo'q. MUNda at least sizlar o'zinglar bilan bir xil fikrlaydigan insonlarni topish sharafiga musharraf bo'lasizlar.
summaryEn: The speaker is in Prague, having just walked through a famous one-person street that even has its own traffic light. He then discusses a Model United Nations (MUN) event, mentioning that his acquaintance Ruxshona is one of the organizers. He highly recommends participating in MUN, highlighting that it provides a valuable opportunity to meet like-minded individuals, even if some might initially doubt its benefits.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum bolajonlar, hormanglar, charchamayapsizlarmi? Sog'liqlar, ahvollar yaxshimi? Bugungi yakshanba kuninglar qanaqa o'tdi? Xo'p, demak, bizniki ajoyib o'tishi davom etmoqda. Va hozir 'Hey son, it's your dad' series 2 ni olishni davom ettiramiz. Ya'ni, yuqorida sizlarga murojaat bilan chiqqandim, o'sha juda ajoyib video qilib bergandim. Sizning kelajakdagi 20 yoshli yo 22 yoshli o'g'lingizga aytadigan gaplaringiz qanaqa bo'lardi degan maqsadda video olinglar, bu foydali bo'ladi. O'zinglar bir kun ko'rasizlar, o'g'linglarga ham o'sha paytdagi mindsetinglar qanaqa bo'lganligini bilib olish nasib qiladi. Yo qizinglarga ham, o'tgan safar faqat o'g'linglar desam noto'g'ri tushunishdi. Kelajakdagi farzandingizga. Va hozirgi sizlarga lokatsiyani ko'rsataman. Qaranglar. Hamma joy quyuq o'rmon, o'rmonni o'rtasida biz. Aynan shunaqa lokatsiyada ikkinchi qismni olamiz. Quyosh botishiga yetib keldik. Xo'p, mana bizning setup. Xo'p, setupga necha...
summaryEn: The speaker greets his audience and asks about their Sunday. He mentions that his day is going great and that they are continuing to film 'Hey son, it's your dad' series 2. He explains that the purpose of this series is to record messages for their future 20-22-year-old sons (or daughters, clarifying a previous misunderstanding), believing it will be beneficial for them to see their parents' mindset from the past. He then shows the filming location, which is a large green field surrounded by a dense forest, noting they are filming at sunset. He also shows his filming setup, which includes a camera on a gimbal.

transcriptUz: Xo'p, hozir videoni oxirida ko'rganinglardek, kamera ancha vaqt ishlatilmay turganligi uchun ochdi. Va hozir sizlarga yana bir qaytadan ko'rsataman. Bu juda go'zal setup bo'ldi. Qo'limizda mikrofon va biz video olishni boshlaymiz, Xudo xohlasa. Ko'p emas, 10 minut, 15 minutlik. Ichingizdagi gaplar, nima qilishini, nima qilgan xatolaringizni kelajakda farzandingiz qilishini xohlamaysiz. Xuddi shu narsani o'g'lingiz bilan ulashib qo'ying. Bu foydali. Qanaqadir hech kimga ko'rinmaydigan folderlarda saqlang. Bu juda ham foydali. Xo'p, mana bizda setup. Juda anavi emas, juda oddiy setup. Demak, ko'rib turibsizlar, hamma narsamiz bor. Petlichka bor. Va mana ko'rib turganinglardek, shu yoqda o'tirib olamiz. Yoki kimni ideyasi bor? Bu tomonga qaratib olaylikmi? U yerda chiroyli manzara bu ham. Yoki ko'lga qaratib olish kerakmi?
summaryEn: The speaker is setting up to record a video, showing his simple setup which includes a microphone and a DJI Osmo camera. He encourages viewers to record short videos (10-15 minutes) sharing their thoughts, experiences, and mistakes, to be shared with their children in the future, emphasizing its usefulness and suggesting saving them in private folders. He then shows the camera setup and asks for ideas on which direction to point the camera, mentioning a beautiful view and a lake.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, xormanglar bolajonlar. Demak, sizlarga bitta gap. Allohga hammasi oson. Esinglardami, Subyektivda videosi chiqqanda? Kim bilan birga ko'rgandik? Do'stlarimiz bilan birgalikda ko'rgandik Montenegroning Jamshid akaning ko'rsatuvlarini. Va hozir biz o'sha Montenegrodanmiz. Ko'rib turganinglar, mana shu qorayibroq ko'rinayotgan, juda chiroyli suvdagi Montenegro bo'ladi. Suv rangini qaranglar. O'ta go'zal. Cho'q go'zal deylarmi edi? Shunaqa dengiz o'rtasida miyaga dam berib, shunaqa manzarada turishga nima yetsin? O'sha gap. Allohga oson. Niyat qilishda judayam ehtiyot bo'linglar, chunki niyatlar amalga oshish xususiyatiga egadir. Shunaqa. Bu videoni yaxshi niyat qilib, kim bilan kelishni xohlagan bo'lsanglar, shunga jo'natib qo'yinglar. Men ham o'rtoqlarim bilan...
summaryEn: Khumoyun Nasipkulov greets his audience from Montenegro, highlighting the beautiful sea and scenery. He recalls watching a video about Montenegro by Jamshid aka on 'Subyektiv' with his friends. He emphasizes that 'everything is easy for Allah' and advises caution with intentions, as they tend to materialize. He encourages viewers to share the video with friends they wish to visit Montenegro with.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum. Yana bitta ajoyib spot topib qo'ydim, bolajonlar. Bu joyga kelish kerak lekin. Va aynan hozir biz kelgan vaqtda kelish kerak. Tayyor bo'lsanglar, hozir ko'rsataman. Bir, ikki, uch. Go'zallikni qaranglar. Quyosh botish paytida. O'ta go'zal.
summaryEn: A man greets viewers and shares that he has found an amazing spot, encouraging them to visit, especially at the time he is there. He then reveals a stunning sunset view over an island in the sea, commenting on its exceptional beauty during sunset. The island appears to be Sveti Stefan in Montenegro.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum akalar. Xudo xohlasa, hamma sharoitga erkak kishi tayyor turish kerak deydi-yu. Mana bugun biz o'ta go'zal manzarada kema ham haydash nasib qildi. Allohga shukur. Nechchi viewga? Biz hozir bu tomon Albaniya, bu tomon Montenegro. Akalar bilan o'sha Skadar ko'lida, mashhur Skadar ko'li. Hamma niyat qilganlarga nasib qilsin. Yo'lda ko'rishamiz, to'xtab qolmaylik.
summaryEn: Khumoyun Nasipkulov greets his audience from a boat on Skadar Lake, which he mentions borders Albania and Montenegro. He expresses gratitude for the beautiful scenery and the opportunity to drive the boat, wishing the same experience for everyone.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, qormanglar. Xolajonlar charchamayapsizlarmi, sog'liqlar, ahvollar yaxshimi? Hozir bitta yaxshi niyat qildim. Shu hozir o'tirgan joyimda bizga ham nasib qilsin inshaalloh. Buni boshqachaligini qaranglar. Har bir detalga qaranglar, urg'u bilan ishlangan. Ey, nasib qilsin hammamizga. Hozir o'sha mashhur BMW muzeyidamiz. Yaxshi kayfiyat, yaxshi kun, charchamanglar.
summaryEn: The speaker greets his audience and expresses a wish to own a car like the one he is currently sitting in, admiring its detailed craftsmanship. He reveals that he is at the famous BMW museum and concludes by wishing everyone a good mood and a good day.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, hormanglar, charchamayapsizlarmi? Sog'liqlar, ahvollar yaxshimi? Xo'p, qaranglar, bir, ikki, uch. Nastroy yaxshi bolalarda. Xudo xohlasa, chiroyli natijalar bo'ladi. Hammaga omad, charchamanglar.
summaryEn: The speaker greets his audience, asks about their well-being, and then shows the Allianz Arena. He expresses that the 'boys' are in a good mood and hopes for good results, wishing everyone good luck and to not get tired.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, varahmatulloh. Hormanglar, charchamayapsizlarmi? Bu go'zallikni sizlarga ko'rsatmasam bo'lmas ekan. Go'zallikni qaranglar.
summaryEn: The video features a man greeting his audience and expressing his need to share the beautiful scenery with them. He then pans the camera to showcase a grand palace or castle with extensive gardens, nestled against a backdrop of lush green mountains and forests, emphasizing the beauty of the landscape.

transcriptUz: Assalomu alaykum, bolajonlar, xormanglar, charchamayapsizlarmi? Sog'liqlar, ahvollar yaxshimi? Bilasizlarmi, men o'sha joyni topdim. Yoshlikdan bir do'stinglar bilan, oilaviy bir joylarga ketamiz deb orzu qilgansizlar-ku, to'g'rimi? Qaranglar endi. Tayyormisizlar, ko'rsataman. Voy mashalloh, go'zalligini qaranglar, voy dod! Eng yaqin o'rtoqlarga tashlab qo'yinglar, qaranglar, mana bu ikkita uy. Bu atrofni qaranglar, bu go'zallikni qaranglar. Buni bor-ku, ko'rib ko'z to'ymayapti. Mana shunaqa joylarda eng katta orzu. Allohga oson. Ana shu uy ikkita uyni sotib olishmi, yoki mana shu o'rtasidan ochib shunaqa joy ikkitalik uy qurishmi, niyat bor. Mana bu yerda ko'priklardan o'tib kelyapmiz hozir. O'ta go'zal, o'ta go'zal. Hozir bu emotsiyani bor-ku, umuman boshqarib bo'lmayapti. Puh, wow, bum. Eng yaqin o'rtoqlarga tashlab qo'yish esdan chiqmasin.
summaryEn: The speaker greets his audience and expresses his excitement about finding a beautiful place in the mountains. He shows a scenic view with a forest, mountains, and two houses, recalling childhood dreams of visiting such places with friends or family. He shares his dream of owning or building houses in this beautiful location and expresses overwhelming emotions about the scenery. He encourages viewers to share the video with their closest friends.
